sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: derive position size from theoretical distribution accounting for extreme tail outcomes (±∞). Size converges toward optimal financing per contract as trade count increases. Specific f value not provided in excerpt—requires distribution fitting.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by accounting for the theoretical distribution's extreme tails (extending to plus and minus infinity) to optimize financing per contract as the number of trades approaches infinity.
